target_definition: Doctor-diagnosed weak/failing kidneys OR elevated creatinine by sex-adjusted threshold
pipeline_gate_rationale: Global routing gate: scores above 0.35 escalate to next pipeline step
recommended_threshold_criterion: Lowest t where precision>=17%, maximising recall: prec=0.170, recall=0.560, f1=0.261, flags=11.5%
selection_rationale: L1 C=0.01 on 34-feat deduped set → 17 survivors; AUC +0.017 vs 34-feat model, precision +2.2pp, recall +5pp at same threshold
changes_from_34feat_model: Feature count reduced 34 → 17 via L1 C=0.01

Dropped: triglycerides, HDL, WBC, total protein, diabetes meds, liver condition, overweight, anemia treatment, bp_2+times, moderate exercise, avg drinks/day, smoking quantity, hepatitis C, work schedule
notes: Discovered via sbp/dbp_mean addition experiment — BP features did not survive L1, but re-selection at C=0.01 revealed more parsimonious feature set with better performance.
